name: Stuffed Figs
recipeIngredient: Candied orange peel, thinly shaved (1 teaspoon per fig)
Candied lemon peel, thinly shaved (1 teaspoon per fig)
Candied cherries, thinly shaved (1 teaspoon per fig)
Coconut, thinly shaved (1 teaspoon per fig)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the candied orange peel, candied lemon peel, candied cherries, and coconut shavings in a bowl.
2. Cover with orange juice and allow to stand for 3 to 4 hours at room temperature.
3. Slit chilled dried figs lengthwise and remove any seeds or pits.
4. Stuff each fig with the prepared fruit mixture.
5. Serve 4-5 stuffed figs per serving, accompanied by a small amount of the syrup used during preparation and some cream as a dessert.
